content.en:
Xiao Yue also sensed her Dao-level natal talent-

【Natal Talent: Hengyue (Dao Level)】

Through the natal talent, Xiao Yue knew the ability of this natal talent, which was to summon an eternal round of full moon to bombard the enemy, and it could also merge with the constant moon to burst out with terrifying power.

But the biggest use of Hengyue's Dao-level natal talent is that Xiao Yue can easily learn the Dao techniques related to the moon at the Zhenjun level, and it just so happens that she chose the three Dao art inheritances, all of which are related to the moon.

Therefore, when she cultivated to the True Monarch level, she could cultivate Dao techniques.

At that time, her strength will inevitably skyrocket to a terrifying level.

The other nine god generals have also obtained a Dao-level natal talent, and these natal talents are all the same in level, all of them are beyond the Dao-level level of the super god level.

But whether you can give full play to your natal talent is the most important thing.

The Dao-level natal talents of the ten divine generals were bred, and the energy of the talent ancestral pool was weakened to a very weak level, and there was almost no way to transform a divine general.

Maybe in the long years to come, the talent ancestral pool will be in a state of recovery.

"It's time to leave!"

A famous god will leave the Ancestral Pool of Talent and return to the outside world.

And Xiao Yue was picked up by the Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven Palace, and Ye Tian was waiting for the exit of the battlefield ruins early.

-------------

"Husband!"

When Xiao Yue saw Ye Tian, she flew over very happily.

"Dao-level natal talent, has it been formed?"

Ye Tian asked with a smile.

He naturally used the copying talent to detect the existence of Xiao Yue's natal talent, but it was impossible to say it directly, so he asked casually.

"Well, it's formed, it's a Dao-level natal talent - Hengyue!"

Xiao Yue didn't hide anything and said directly.

"Well, that's good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he used the copying talent to try to copy Xiao Yue's Dao-level natal talent, and the copying was quickly completed, as long as he went back and fused it, he would also have the Dao-level natal talent.

Next, Ye Tian did not leave here, but waited for the other divine generals who came out of the talent ancestral pool.

If these god generals leave, they will definitely leave from here, this is also the only exit from the battlefield relics at present, as for tearing the barrier of the battlefield, even the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor is more difficult, and it is generally not done like this.

Ye Tian didn't want to leave now, causing him to miss the contact with the nine god generals, causing the nine god generals to be in retreat for a long time in the future.

In that case, wouldn't he be able to replicate their Dao-level natal talent for a long time!

Fortunately, everything is progressing according to Ye Tian's calculations, and the nine god generals did not stay at the battlefield ruins for long, nor did they go to the God Heaven Boundary Monument to comprehend, and they at the level of the Ten Star God Generals will go to the God Heaven Realm Monument to comprehend now, which is a complete waste of opportunity.

Therefore, they couldn't wait to leave the battlefield ruins, preparing to return to the True Kingdom or the stronghold of the Quasi-Dao Realm to retreat honestly and attack the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

It didn't take long for a famous god to leave the battlefield ruins under the escort of many powerhouses, and Ye Tian did not meet them directly, but only secretly copied their Dao-level natal talent.

As a result, Ye Tian suddenly possessed the ten Dao-level natal talents.

These ten Dao-level natal talents are Hengyue, Reincarnation Innate, Endless Sea of Suffering, Void Blade, Hades, Uncrystalline Ice Realm, Desolate Emperor, Life and Death Blood Realm, Dun Yu, and Sound Kill.

These ten natal talents have their own special qualities, and even some talents look similar to some ordinary talents, but they themselves have reached the Dao level, and the power of the talents themselves surpasses most Chaos Divine Powers.

And the Dao-level natal talent of reincarnation was the most surprising to Ye Tian, because this Dao-level natal talent actually had the effect of resurrection and reincarnation, and it could be used on himself.

For example, you will be killed by a single blow, but as long as you cast reincarnation at the moment of being killed, you can be resurrected again.

In addition, he can also cast a reincarnation innate temporary reincarnation into a new life, and he can lift the reincarnation state with a single thought.

Of course, this is not a reincarnation in the true sense of the word, but a special state that can be used to enter the mundane state of mind in the future.

"It's a pity that you can't fuse the Dao-level natal talent!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Of course, this is not to say that the Dao-level natal talent cannot be fused, it can only be said that his copying talent is currently at a low level, and if he is upgraded to another level, he can definitely fuse the Dao-level natal talent.

However, at present, the Dao-level natal talent is sufficient.

Xiao Yue went into retreat, preparing to cultivate for a period of time, and then he could transcend, and then impact the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

Ye Tian did not retreat, but waited, preparing to wait for Xiao Yue to enter the Heavenly Mandate Realm before he could rest assured to go to retreat.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

On this day, Xiao Yue's state was raised to the limit, and she finally chose to detach.

With Xiao Yue's strength, this time the detachment was not difficult at all, Xiao Yue easily resisted the catastrophe of the detachment, and then stepped into the realm of the Mandate of Heaven and became a Heavenly Monarch again.

Compared with the previous life, Xiao Yue's current life is far stronger than the previous life, and she can kill multiple of herself in the same realm in an instant.

Xiao Yue broke through to the realm of Heavenly Mandate, and it would take a long time to retreat and cultivate.

Therefore, Ye Tian also chose to retreat and cultivate, specializing in Taoist cultivation.

He is ready to cultivate the Dao Technique, and then raise the Divine Soul and Divine Power to the limit, and then try to cultivate the Endless Dao to the level of 100,000 meters, and truly condense a complete Endless Dao, so as to break through to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

For Dao techniques, Ye Tian also obtained some, although it was not much, but it was enough for the time being.

The first Dao technique he wanted to cultivate was the Sky Splitting Technique!

This is a spatial dao technique, and he happens to have the void blade, a dao-level natal talent involving space, if he cultivates the void splitting technique, he can completely practice it.

Originally, Ye Tian thought that it would take a long time for him to practice a Dao Technique, but with the assistance of the Super God-level Transcendent Comprehension Talent, he had cultivated the Dao Technique of Splitting the Sky Technique to the entry level in just a thousand years.

"Amazing, amazing!"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked in his heart: "According to the information of the domain realm, even if the Dao Ancestor cultivates the Dao Technique, there is no way to cultivate a Dao Technique to the entry level in just one thousand years, although I have the talent of transcendent enlightenment, it is impossible for me to be so rebellious!"

He thought of the Dao-level natal talent of the Void Blade, and the Dao-level natal talent made him cultivate the Dao technique too fast, far beyond his imagination.

At this time, Ye Tian finally realized the anti-heaven nature of the Dao-level natal talent!

Moreover, it is difficult for some Dao Ancestors to cultivate a Dao technique to the realm of Xiaocheng, Dacheng, and Consummation, but for Dao-level natal talents, as long as they fit their own Dao Technique, they can quickly practice it.

This is also the reason why every Dao Ancestor is extremely eager for Dao-level natal talent, but unfortunately the Talent Ancestral Pool is only allowed to enter the god-level, otherwise countless Dao Ancestors will fight desperately because of the Talent Ancestral Pool.

Ye Tian did not go out, but continued to participate in the Void Splitting Technique, striving to cultivate this Dao Technique to a higher level as soon as possible, so as to greatly improve his strength.
